description.ko: 스캔라인을 가르며 가속하는 파편화된 기하가 엄격한 균형을 유지하는 흑백 신호 악보.
description.en: A monochrome signal score where fractured geometry accelerates through scanlines while preserving strict balance.

prompt: KURO-X artwork titled "Luma Shear Score": a black and white geometric glitch abstraction arranged as a vertical score of fractured signal notation, with no character, logo, sculpture, sphere, cube, monolith, or single central object. Dense columns of #1A1A1A angular bars, #FFFFFF blank interruptions, and #808080 / #C0C0C0 splintered facets stack into an unstable rhythm like a corrupted monochrome transmission being read at extreme speed. The frame is divided by abrupt phase jumps: narrow triangular wedges, clipped parallelogram slats, serrated waveform teeth, diagonal slash marks, and misaligned rectangular registers appear to skip forward by several frames while still forming a balanced all-over composition. Fine horizontal scanlines, grayscale sync errors, luma-only ghosting, hard compression tiles, broken calibration ticks, and medium-density square particle debris add intense mechanical noise. High contrast, crisp vector edges, sharp angles, fast visual motion, cold abstract depth, chaotic fragments held in exact mathematical equilibrium.
